record.field: Employees Without First Name

employees_without_first_name = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_legal_first_name', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_first_name: warning_count = len(employees_without_first_name) warning_records = employees_without_first_name
Employees Without Last Name

employees_without_last_name = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_legal_last_name', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_last_name: warning_count = len(employees_without_last_name) warning_records = employees_without_last_name
Employees Without Salary Certificate Profiles

employees_without_salary_certificate_profiles= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_salary_certificate_profiles', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_salary_certificate_profiles: warning_count = len(employees_without_salary_certificate_profiles) warning_records = employees_without_salary_certificate_profiles
Employees Without Nationality(Country)

employees_without_country= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('country_id', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_country: warning_count = len(employees_without_country) warning_records = employees_without_country
Employees Without Residence Canton

employees_without_canton= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_canton', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_canton: warning_count = len(employees_without_canton) warning_records = employees_without_canton
Employees Without Residence Municipality

employees = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_canton', '!=', 'EX'), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ])
employees_without_valid_municipality = employees.filtered( lambda e: not e.l10n_ch_municipality or not e.l10n_ch_municipality.isdigit() )
if employees_without_valid_municipality: warning_count = len(employees_without_valid_municipality) warning_records = employees_without_valid_municipality
Employees Without Private Address Street

employees_without_private_street = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('private_street', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_private_street: warning_count = len(employees_without_private_street) warning_records = employees_without_private_street
Employees Without Private Address City

employees_without_private_city = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('private_city', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_private_city: warning_count = len(employees_without_private_city) warning_records = employees_without_private_city
Employees Without Private Address ZIP

employees_without_private_zip = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('private_zip', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_private_zip: warning_count = len(employees_without_private_zip) warning_records = employees_without_private_zip
Employees Without Private Address Country

employees_without_private_country = self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('private_country_id', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_private_country: warning_count = len(employees_without_private_country) warning_records = employees_without_private_country
Employees Without Marital Status

employees_without_marital_status= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('marital', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_marital_status: warning_count = len(employees_without_marital_status) warning_records = employees_without_marital_status
Employees Without Marital Status Start Date

employees_without_marital_from= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_marital_from', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_marital_from: warning_count = len(employees_without_marital_from) warning_records = employees_without_marital_from
Employees Without Employee Reference

employees_without_employee_reference= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('registration_number', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_employee_reference: warning_count = len(employees_without_employee_reference) warning_records = employees_without_employee_reference
Employees Without Contract Type

employees_without_contract_type= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('contract_type_id', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_contract_type: warning_count = len(employees_without_contract_type) warning_records = employees_without_contract_type
Employees Without LAA Insurance

employees_without_laa_code= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_laa_group', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_laa_code: warning_count = len(employees_without_laa_code) warning_records = employees_without_laa_code
Employees Missing Weekly Hours Info

employees_missing_weekly_hours_info= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('irregular_working_time', '=', False), ('l10n_ch_weekly_hours', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_missing_weekly_hours_info: warning_count = len(employees_missing_weekly_hours_info) warning_records = employees_missing_weekly_hours_info
Employees Without AVS/AC Insurance

employees_without_social_insurance= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_social_insurance_id', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_social_insurance: warning_count = len(employees_without_social_insurance) warning_records = employees_without_social_insurance
Employees Without LPP Insurance

employees_without_lpp_insurance= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_lpp_insurance_id', '=', False), ('l10n_ch_lpp_not_insured', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_lpp_insurance: warning_count = len(employees_without_lpp_insurance) warning_records = employees_without_lpp_insurance
Employees Without Family Compensation Fund

employees_without_compensation_fund= self.env['hr.employee'].search([ ('l10n_ch_compensation_fund_id', '=', False), ('company_id', 'in', self.env.companies.ids), ]) if employees_without_compensation_fund: warning_count = len(employees_without_compensation_fund) warning_records = employees_without_compensation_fund
Companies Without AVS/AC Insurance

companies_without_social_insurance = self.env.companies.filtered(lambda c: not c.l10n_ch_avs_institution_ids) if companies_without_social_insurance: warning_count = len(companies_without_social_insurance) warning_records = companies_without_social_insurance
Companies Without Valid Compensation Fund

companies_without_compensation_fund = self.env.companies.filtered(lambda c: not c.l10n_ch_caf_institution_ids or not any(line.company_rate > 0 for inst in c.l10n_ch_caf_institution_ids for line in inst.caf_line_ids)) if companies_without_compensation_fund: warning_count = len(companies_without_compensation_fund) warning_records = companies_without_compensation_fund
Companies Without Location Unit

companies_without_location_unit = self.env.companies.filtered(lambda c: not c.l10n_ch_work_location_ids) if companies_without_location_unit: warning_count = len(companies_without_location_unit) warning_records = companies_without_location_unit
Companies Without Salary Certificate Profiles

companies_without_salary_certificate_profile = self.env.companies.filtered(lambda c: not c.l10n_ch_salary_certificate_profiles) if companies_without_salary_certificate_profile: warning_count = len(companies_without_salary_certificate_profile) warning_records = companies_without_salary_certificate_profile
Companies Without Valid LAA Insurance

companies_without_valid_accident_insurance = self.env.companies.filtered(lambda c: not c.l10n_ch_laa_institution_ids or not any(inst.laa_group_ids for inst in c.l10n_ch_laa_institution_ids)) if companies_without_valid_accident_insurance: warning_count = len(companies_without_valid_accident_insurance) warning_records = companies_without_valid_accident_insurance
Companies Without LPP Insurance

companies_without_lpp_insurance = self.env.companies.filtered(lambda c: not c.l10n_ch_lpp_institution_ids) if companies_without_lpp_insurance: warning_count = len(companies_without_lpp_insurance) warning_records = companies_without_lpp_insurance
